title: parathelypteris auriculata
intro: Parathelypteris auriculata, also known as the auriculated lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Parathelypteris auriculata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
